title: Omega Multispeciality Hospital - Yelahanka - Bangalore North
heading: Welcome to Omega Multispecialty Hospital
description: Omega Multispeciality Hospital, Yelahanka, Bangalore, is a multispeciality hospital in Yelahanka New Town, North Bangalore having such facilities as modular OT, Ultrasound and Doppler, NICU, ICU, USG ULTRA SOUND AND DOPPLER, 2 D ECHO, hi-end labarotary, 24x7 pharmacy, 24x7 emergency and a 24x7 ambulance. Omega Multispeciality Hospital, Yelahanka, Bangalore, is an ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001, ISO 50001 certified multispeciality hospital in Bangalore. Omega Multispeciality Hospital, Yelahanka, Bangalore, is a multispeciality hospital in Bangalore having experienced and competent doctors in General Medicine, Pediatrics, Neonatology, Obstetrics, Gynecology, ENT, Surgery, Orthopedics, Plastic Surgery, Anesthesiology, Intensivist, Radiology, Urology, Rheumatology, Neuro Surgery, Neurology, Onco Surgery, Pulmonology, Pathology.
